_comment: Module 5 quality gates configuration. Edit thresholds here — no code changes required.

gates.name: Unit Test Coverage
gates.description: Minimum percentage of lines covered by unit tests.

gates.name: Branch Coverage
gates.description: Minimum percentage of code branches exercised by tests.

gates.name: SAST High-Severity Findings
gates.description: Maximum number of HIGH-severity security findings allowed. Any HIGH finding triggers immediate rollback if already deployed.

gates.name: Lighthouse Performance Score
gates.description: Minimum Google Lighthouse performance score for the checkout frontend.

gates.name: P95 Latency Regression
gates.description: Maximum allowed increase in P95 latency compared to the previous deployment. Values above 10% indicate performance regression.

gates.name: Cost Per Request Regression
gates.description: Maximum allowed increase in compute cost per request. Prevents runaway spending from inefficient code paths.
